creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: marino
Date: Fri Jul 12 22:51:34 2013
New Revision: 322870
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322870

Log:
  security/dmitry: Replace MASTER_SITES to restore fetching
  
  PR:		ports/179651
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (>3 weeks), bapt (mentor)

Modified:
  head/security/dmitry/Makefile

Modified: head/security/dmitry/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/security/dmitry/Makefile	Fri Jul 12 22:43:29 2013	(r322869)
+++ head/security/dmitry/Makefile	Fri Jul 12 22:51:34 2013	(r322870)
@@ -1,15 +1,11 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	DMitry
-# Date created:		5 Feb 2005
-# Whom:			Vaida Bogdan
-#
+# Created by: Vaida Bogdan
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	dmitry
 PORTVERSION=	1.3a
 CATEGORIES=	security
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.mor-pah.net/code/ \
-		http://www.deepmagic.org.uk/
+MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_PACKETSTORM}
+MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	UNIX/misc
 DISTNAME=	DMitry-${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	acm@FreeBSD.org
